rulings.Case Title: NIGEL CHANTER ET AL VS. GREGORY MALIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: RESPONSE TO PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 5, 2024 line . RESPONSE TO PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD Respondent's request to vacate the arbitration award is DENIED. The arbitration award is confirmed and shall be the final judgment of the Court. The arbitrator acted within his discretion in denying respondent's request for continuance. There was no substantial prejudice caused by the denial of the continuance. The operative "Operating Agreement" upon which the arbitration at JAMS was based did not preclude the award of punitive damages. To the extent the arbitration clause from the Subscription Agreement may be applicable to any of the claims the parties voluntarily submitted to JAMS arbitration, the award would be corrected to reflect that the entirety of the $48,146,336 as compensatory damages This tentative ruling shall be treated as a tentative decision. Petitioner to prepare a proposed statement of decision and submit it to the Court no later than July 22, 2024 in electronic format. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: NAIFEH AZAR VS. PABLO E. RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Evidence And Terminating Sanctions And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Of Naifeh Azar

DEFENDANT PABLO RODRIGUEZ Notice Of Motion And Motion For Evidence And Terminating Sanctions And For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Of Naifeh Azar is DENIED in its entirety.
